---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Upload '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or tracebacks.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12]
- Browser (if UI-related): [e.g. Chrome 126]
- Branch/commit: [e.g. main @ abc1234]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. was AI ticket extraction involved,
which route, etc.).
